description_long: This is a compact, two-seater armchair upholstered in a muted olive green fabric. The backrest is gently rounded and features a tufted design with evenly spaced buttons, adding a touch of classic elegance. The armrests are thick, padded, and smoothly integrated into the overall silhouette, providing comfort and support. The seat cushion is plush and appears removable, matching the upholstery of the rest of the chair. The armchair stands on four short, cylindrical metal legs with a polished finish, giving it a modern touch and elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall design is both inviting and sturdy, suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or sidewalk lounges.
description: A compact olive green armchair with a tufted, rounded backrest, padded armrests, and short metal legs. The design is plush, modern, and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, padded armrests, and plush seat cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the armrest and the gentle curve of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back and the two metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the armrest profile and the chair's depth.
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, medium height, tufted with buttons
